description_long: This is a light blue athletic shoe with a breathable mesh upper and a low-cut design, ideal for urban walking or running. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with five eyelets and a padded tongue for comfort. The midsole is white with sculpted cutouts, providing both cushioning and a modern aesthetic, while the outsole is slightly yellowed, likely for added grip and durability. The heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing, and the overall construction appears lightweight and flexible. Subtle wave-like patterns are integrated into the mesh, enhancing both style and ventilation. The interior is lined with soft fabric, and the shoe shows no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A light blue mesh athletic shoe with a white sculpted sole, lace-up closure, and a pull tab at the heel. The design is modern, breathable, and lightweight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mesh upper, sculpted white midsole, and subtle wave patterns.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the lace-up closure, padded tongue, and rounded toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the heel pull tab, mesh ventilation, and midsole cutouts.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel structure, pull tab, and the back of the sole.
